title: Caveman Challenge
description: No going above y level 32, you still can in the nether and end.
body:
A fun survival challenge were you can't go above y level 32, you still can in the nether and end. This datapack is inspired by the challenge ibxtoycat did: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zsQ-5Nt04Rc&list=PLe8AZ2rjfkpw15Z-CwYMcYp9hkoV3g7ak&ab_channel=ibxtoycat

How to set up the datapack:

Step #1 Create a world with the datapack enabled.

Step #2 Click the open to lan button in the game menu and enable cheats.

Step #3 Find a cave below y level 32 and place bed and set your spawn point.

Step #4 Go into survival mod and type /function cave:start (gives you a starter box and night vison for ten minutes) or /function cave:man (No starter box or night vision). After running the command you will not be able to go above y level 32.

Step #5 Leave and rejoin the world so lan is no longer enabled.
